summary: Iteration 11 testing complete: Payment Reminders and Lead CRM Integration. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend Invoicing page working with payment summary cards, Overdue tab, and Mark Paid dialog.
features_tested: POST /api/invoices/reminders/{invoice_id}/send - Send payment reminder ✓ (SendGrid not configured - expected)
POST /api/leads - Submit website lead and sync to CRM ✓
Frontend: Invoicing page shows payment summary cards (Outstanding, Collected, Overdue, Pending Reminders) ✓
Frontend: Invoicing page has Overdue tab with 'No overdue invoices' message ✓
Frontend: Mark Paid dialog works correctly with payment date and method fields ✓

payment_reminders_apis.description: Payment reminder endpoints (summary, pending, mark-paid, send, update-overdue)

lead_crm_apis.description: Lead CRM endpoints (get leads, submit lead, convert, analytics)

elements_verified: Payment summary cards: Outstanding (£240.00), Collected (£120.00), Overdue (0), Pending Reminders (1)
4 tabs: All Invoices (14), Drafts (8), Sent (2), Overdue (0)
Overdue tab shows 'No overdue invoices - Great job!' with green checkmark
Sent tab shows invoices with Mark Paid button
Mark Paid dialog opens with Amount, Payment Date, Payment Method fields
Cancel and Confirm Payment buttons in dialog

growth_page.notes: Growth module Leads tab uses different data source than new Lead CRM. New leads are stored in contacts collection with source='website'

sendgrid_email.reason: SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL not configured with verified sender
sendgrid_email.expected_behavior: Returns error message: 'Email service not configured. Please set SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL to a verified sender.'

seed_data_creation: Created test leads via /api/leads endpoint during testing. Leads stored in contacts collection with source='website' and tags=['website-lead']. One lead converted to customer status.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 adds: 1) PaymentReminderService with standard schedule (3 days before, due date, 7 days overdue) - routes at /api/invoices/reminders/*. 2) LeadCRMService for website lead capture - routes at /api/leads/*. Leads are stored in contacts collection with source='website'. 3) Frontend Invoicing page updated with payment summary cards and Mark Paid dialog. 4) SendGrid email is MOCKED - requires verified sender email in SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL env var. Previous iterations covered Intelligence Graph, WebSocket notifications, Custom Domains, Team Collaboration, AI Website Builder, Product Catalogue, Business Documents, Enhanced Invoicing with PDF generation.
